div.font:
IVT Messages (Isabellenhuette IVT-S):
RX: 0x521 (current) | 0x522-0x524 (V1-V3) | 0x525 (temp) | 0x526 (power) | 0x527 (CC)
DIAG: CURRENT_SENSOR_RESPONDING (100×10ms, FTTI 1250ms) | V1/V2/V3 timeout (1×10ms, 160ms)
⚠ L-009: invalidFlag=1 means VALID | ⚠ L-011: must send 0x524 every cycle | ⚠ L-019: gate current on FB

div.font:
Vehicle CAN: TX: 0x220-0x260 (BMS state, voltages, temps) | RX: 0x210 (state request)
DIAG: CAN_TIMING (100×10ms, FTTI 1250ms) | Dashed = galvanically isolated path

switch.text: Vehicle CAN: TX: 0x220-0x260 (BMS state, voltages, temps) | RX: 0x210 (state request)...
